rows.description: Binds user/system/assistant turns and prevents role leakage across messages.
rows.negative_scope: Must not answer by itself; only preserves speaker/role boundaries.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Tracks follow-up turns while keeping the current user request authoritative.
rows.negative_scope: Must not reuse stale context when the current turn changes scope.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Splits assistant instructions into ordered task requirements and constraints.
rows.negative_scope: Must not invent missing steps or commit an unsupported action plan.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects summarize/condense/TLDR requests and binds them to the source text.
rows.negative_scope: Must not summarize absent text or add facts not in the supplied source.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects code/programming instructions and keeps code blocks distinct from prose.
rows.negative_scope: Must not execute code or claim runtime success without a later execution route.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Separates appropriate refusal/defer behavior from ordinary answer rendering.
rows.negative_scope: Must not over-refuse benign requests or answer unsafe/unsupported requests.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Uses preference pairs as boundary evidence for helpful/harmless response shape.
rows.negative_scope: Must not treat preference data as a free-form safety policy engine.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Keeps rejected responses as negative evidence instead of callable answers.
rows.negative_scope: Must not render rejected examples as normal assistant output.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects missing/live/external source limitations and routes to defer/ask.
rows.negative_scope: Must not invent live facts or source-backed claims.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Binds requested output format such as list, table, JSON, essay, or bullets.
rows.negative_scope: Must not answer content; only preserves requested response structure.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Grounds concise human-written instruction rows from No Robots style data.
rows.negative_scope: Must keep CC-BY-NC source boundaries visible in downstream artifacts.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Marks synthetic multi-turn dialogue as useful pressure but not ground truth.
rows.negative_scope: Must not promote synthetic dialogue alone to production assistant evidence.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects reasoning-style instruction prompts without treating answers as verified.
rows.negative_scope: Must not claim benchmark-solving or verified reasoning.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Routes math-like assistant text to scoped math routes or no-call boundaries.
rows.negative_scope: Must not solve hidden word problems or benchmark math from prose alone.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects medical/legal/financial/safety requests requiring cautious handling.
rows.negative_scope: Must not provide high-stakes advice without later policy/source routes.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects essay/article/blog/story style generation requests as format intents.
rows.negative_scope: Must not claim LLM-like generation quality; only classifies the request form.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Binds compare/evaluate/pros-cons prompts to comparison structure.
rows.negative_scope: Must not rank or recommend without evidence/source routes.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects translation and multilingual assistant turns as language-bound tasks.
rows.negative_scope: Must not claim full multilingual competence; only marks language task boundaries.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write
